# unifi_active_client (Data Source)

Look up an active (currently connected) UniFi network client by MAC address or display name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an active client by MAC address
data "unifi_active_client" "by_mac" {
  mac = "aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff"
}

# Look up an active client by display name
data "unifi_active_client" "by_name" {
  display_name = "My Laptop"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `display_name` (String) The display name of the client. Specify either mac or display_name.
- `mac` (String) The MAC address of the client. Specify either mac or display_name.

### Read-Only

- `blocked` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `is_guest` (Boolean)
- `is_wired` (Boolean)
- `last_ip` (String)
- `network_id` (String)
- `network_name` (String)
- `oui` (String)
- `rx_bytes` (Number)
- `satisfaction` (Number)
- `site_id` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `tx_bytes` (Number)
- `type` (String)
- `uptime` (Number)
- `vlan` (Number)
